title: Job Opening Teacher at IDP Education India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at IDP Education India
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Teacher in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!
